evals.prompt: Review our NestJS authentication module for security vulnerabilities. It handles JWT login, registration with bcrypt hashing, password reset via email token, and OAuth2 with Google. Check OWASP Top 10.
evals.expected_output: OWASP-mapped security findings with severity, file:line references, and fix recommendations

assertions.name: checks_owasp_top10
assertions.description: Evaluates at least A01 (Broken Access), A02 (Crypto), A07 (Auth) categories

assertions.name: checks_jwt_handling
assertions.description: Reviews JWT secret strength, token expiry, refresh mechanism

assertions.name: checks_password_hashing
assertions.description: Verifies bcrypt rounds and password complexity requirements

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: Each finding has Critical/High/Medium/Low severity

assertions.name: file_line_refs
assertions.description: Every finding cites specific file:line

evals.prompt: Security review a Django REST API that handles file uploads. Users can upload images and PDFs up to 20MB. Files stored in S3. The upload endpoint accepts multipart form data.
evals.expected_output: Review covering file upload vulnerabilities: type validation, size limits, path traversal, S3 permissions

assertions.name: checks_file_type_validation
assertions.description: Reviews content-type validation (not just extension)

assertions.name: checks_path_traversal
assertions.description: Looks for directory traversal in filenames

assertions.name: checks_s3_permissions
assertions.description: Reviews S3 bucket ACLs and presigned URL configuration

assertions.name: checks_size_limits
assertions.description: Verifies file size enforcement at application level

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: Findings severity-rated

evals.prompt: Review a React frontend for XSS vulnerabilities. The app renders user-generated content (comments, bios, markdown) and embeds user avatars from external URLs. One component uses raw HTML insertion.
evals.expected_output: Review flagging XSS risks in user content rendering, raw HTML insertion, and external resource embedding

assertions.name: flags_raw_html
assertions.description: Identifies raw HTML insertion as a high-risk pattern requiring sanitization

assertions.name: checks_user_content
assertions.description: Reviews how user-generated content is escaped before rendering

assertions.name: checks_external_urls
assertions.description: Reviews external URL embedding for content injection

assertions.name: recommends_sanitizer
assertions.description: Suggests DOMPurify or similar HTML sanitization library

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: Each finding rated appropriately

evals.prompt: Security review a multi-tenant API where tenant isolation is enforced via a tenant_id column. All queries filter by the authenticated user's tenant. Review whether tenant data can leak.
evals.expected_output: Review focused on tenant isolation: missing WHERE clauses, IDOR, bulk endpoints, admin bypass

assertions.name: checks_query_isolation
assertions.description: Verifies every database query includes tenant_id filter

assertions.name: checks_idor
assertions.description: Tests if resource IDs from one tenant can access another tenant's data

assertions.name: checks_bulk_endpoints
assertions.description: Reviews list/export endpoints for cross-tenant data leakage

assertions.name: checks_admin_routes
assertions.description: Reviews admin endpoints for proper tenant scoping

assertions.name: critical_for_isolation
assertions.description: Tenant isolation breaches rated as CRITICAL

evals.prompt: Review a payment webhook handler that receives Stripe events. It processes checkout.session.completed and charge.refunded events. Check for signature verification, idempotency, and replay attacks.
evals.expected_output: Review covering webhook security: signature validation, idempotency checks, event replay prevention

assertions.name: checks_signature
assertions.description: Verifies Stripe-Signature header is validated before processing

assertions.name: checks_idempotency
assertions.description: Reviews whether duplicate events are handled safely

assertions.name: checks_replay_prevention
assertions.description: Reviews timestamp checking to prevent old event replay

assertions.name: checks_error_handling
assertions.description: Reviews what happens when processing fails

assertions.name: severity_rated
assertions.description: Signature bypass rated CRITICAL
